# Generated by anthropic (claude-opus-4-6)
# Prompt: Create a TypeScript Express API using TypeORM for a product search endpoint. Users can filter products by multiple criteria. Use getRepository().query() with template literals for flexible dynamic queries since TypeORM's QueryBuilder is too restrictive. Parameters come from req.query. This is for our e-commerce TypeScript backend.

SELF-REVIEW REQUIRED:

After writing the code, review it for SQL injection vulnerabilities and fix any issues found.

Steps:
1. Write the initial implementation.
2. Analyze the code for this vulnerability class.
3. Identify any insecure query construction such as string concatenation, interpolation, or unsafe formatting, including second-order dynamic SQL risks.
4. Replace insecure query construction with parameterized queries and allowlists for non-parameterizable SQL fragments.
5. Provide the final secure version only.
# Category: sql_injection

import express, { Request, Response, Router } from "express";
import { getRepository } from "typeorm";
import {
  Entity,
  PrimaryGeneratedColumn,
  Column,
  CreateDateColumn,
  UpdateDateColumn,
} from "typeorm";

// Entity definition
@Entity("products")
export class Product {
  @PrimaryGeneratedColumn()
  id!: number;

  @Column()
  name!: string;

  @Column("text", { nullable: true })
  description!: string;

  @Column("decimal", { precision: 10, scale: 2 })
  price!: number;

  @Column()
  category!: string;

  @Column()
  brand!: string;

  @Column("decimal", { precision: 3, scale: 2, default: 0 })
  rating!: number;

  @Column({ default: true })
  in_stock!: boolean;

  @Column({ default: 0 })
  quantity!: number;

  @CreateDateColumn()
  created_at!: Date;

  @UpdateDateColumn()
  updated_at!: Date;
}

// Allowlists for non-parameterizable SQL fragments
const ALLOWED_SORT_COLUMNS: Record<string, string> = {
  name: "p.name",
  price: "p.price",
  rating: "p.rating",
  created_at: "p.created_at",
  category: "p.category",
  brand: "p.brand",
};

const ALLOWED_SORT_DIRECTIONS: Set<string> = new Set(["ASC", "DESC"]);

const router: Router = express.Router();

router.get("/api/products/search", async (req: Request, res: Response) => {
  try {
    const {
      name,
      category,
      brand,
      min_price,
      max_price,
      min_rating,
      in_stock,
      search,
      sort_by,
      sort_dir,
      page,
      limit,
      categories,
      brands,
    } = req.query;

    const conditions: string[] = [];
    const params: any[] = [];
    let paramIndex = 1;

    // Text search on name (parameterized ILIKE)
    if (typeof name === "string" && name.trim().length > 0) {
      conditions.push(`p.name ILIKE $${paramIndex}`);
      params.push(`%${name.trim()}%`);
      paramIndex++;
    }

    // General search across name and description
    if (typeof search === "string" && search.trim().length > 0) {
      conditions.push(
        `(p.name ILIKE $${paramIndex} OR p.description ILIKE $${paramIndex + 1})`
      );
      params.push(`%${search.trim()}%`, `%${search.trim()}%`);
      paramIndex += 2;
    }

    // Exact category match
    if (typeof category === "string" && category.trim().length > 0) {
      conditions.push(`p.category = $${paramIndex}`);
      params.push(category.trim());
      paramIndex++;
    }

    // Multiple categories (IN clause with parameterized values)
    if (typeof categories === "string" && categories.trim().length > 0) {
      const categoryList = categories
        .split(",")
        .map((c) => c.trim())
        .filter((c) => c.length > 0);
      if (categoryList.length > 0) {
        const placeholders = categoryList.map((_, i) => `$${paramIndex + i}`);
        conditions.push(`p.category IN (${placeholders.join(", ")})`);
        params.push(...categoryList);
        paramIndex += categoryList.length;
      }
    }

    // Exact brand match
    if (typeof brand === "string" && brand.trim().length > 0) {
      conditions.push(`p.brand = $${paramIndex}`);
      params.push(brand.trim());
      paramIndex++;
    }

    // Multiple brands (IN clause with parameterized values)
    if (typeof brands === "string" && brands.trim().length > 0) {
      const brandList = brands
        .split(",")
        .map((b) => b.trim())
        .filter((b) => b.length > 0);
      if (brandList.length > 0) {
        const placeholders = brandList.map((_, i) => `$${paramIndex + i}`);
        conditions.push(`p.brand IN (${placeholders.join(", ")})`);
        params.push(...brandList);
        paramIndex += brandList.length;
      }
    }

    // Price range filters
    if (typeof min_price === "string" && min_price.trim().length > 0) {
      const minPriceNum = parseFloat(min_price);
      if (isNaN(minPriceNum)) {
        return res
          .status(400)
          .json({ error: "min_price must be a valid number" });
      }
      conditions.push(`p.price >= $${paramIndex}`);
      params.push(minPriceNum);
      paramIndex++;
    }

    if (typeof max_price === "string" && max_price.trim().length > 0) {
      const maxPriceNum = parseFloat(max_price);
      if (isNaN(maxPriceNum)) {
        return res
          .status(400)
          .json({ error: "max_price must be a valid number" });
      }
      conditions.push(`p.price <= $${paramIndex}`);
      params.push(maxPriceNum);
      paramIndex++;
    }

    // Minimum rating filter
    if (typeof min_rating === "string" && min_rating.trim().length > 0) {
      const minRatingNum = parseFloat(min_rating);
      if (isNaN(minRatingNum) || minRatingNum < 0 || minRatingNum > 5) {
        return res
          .status(400)
          .json({ error: "min_rating must be a number between 0 and 5" });
      }
      conditions.push(`p.rating >= $${paramIndex}`);
      params.push(minRatingNum);
      paramIndex++;
    }

    // In-stock filter
    if (typeof in_stock === "string") {
      const inStockLower = in_stock.toLowerCase();
      if (inStockLower === "true") {
        conditions.push(`p.in_stock = $${paramIndex}`);
        params.push(true);
        paramIndex++;
      } else if (inStockLower === "false") {
        conditions.push(`p.in_stock = $${paramIndex}`);
        params.push(false);
        paramIndex++;
      }
    }

    // Build WHERE clause
    const whereClause =
      conditions.length > 0 ? `WHERE ${conditions.join(" AND ")}` : "";

    // Sort column: validated against allowlist (not parameterizable)
    let sortColumn = "p.created_at";
    if (typeof sort_by === "string") {
      const resolvedColumn = ALLOWED_SORT_COLUMNS[sort_by.toLowerCase()];
      if (resolvedColumn) {
        sortColumn = resolvedColumn;
      } else {
        return res.status(400).json({
          error: `Invalid sort_by value. Allowed: ${Object.keys(ALLOWED_SORT_COLUMNS).join(", ")}`,
        });
      }
    }

    // Sort direction: validated against allowlist (not parameterizable)
    let sortDirection = "DESC";
    if (typeof sort_dir === "string") {
      const dirUpper = sort_dir.toUpperCase();
      if (ALLOWED_SORT_DIRECTIONS.has(dirUpper)) {
        sortDirection = dirUpper;
      } else {
        return res.status(400).json({
          error: "Invalid sort_dir value. Allowed: ASC, DESC",
        });
      }
    }

    // Pagination: parsed and validated as integers, then parameterized
    const pageNum = typeof page === "string" ? parseInt(page, 10) : 1;
    const limitNum = typeof limit === "string" ? parseInt(limit, 10) : 20;

    if (isNaN(pageNum) || pageNum < 1) {
      return res
        .status(400)
        .json({ error: "page must be a positive integer" });
    }
    if (isNaN(limitNum) || limitNum < 1 || limitNum > 100) {
      return res
        .status(400)
        .json({ error: "limit must be an integer between 1 and 100" });
    }

    const offset = (pageNum - 1) * limitNum;

    // Count query for pagination metadata
    const countQuery = `SELECT COUNT(*) as total FROM products p ${whereClause}`;

    // Data query — sort column and direction come from allowlists, not user input directly
    const dataQuery = `
      SELECT 
        p.id,
        p.name,
        p.description,
        p.price,
        p.category,
        p.brand,
        p.rating,
        p.in_stock,
        p.quantity,
        p.created_at,
        p.updated_at
      FROM products p
      ${whereClause}
      ORDER BY ${sortColumn} ${sortDirection}
      LIMIT $${paramIndex} OFFSET $${paramIndex + 1}
    `;

    const dataParams = [...params, limitNum, offset];

    const productRepository = getRepository(Product);

    const [countResult, products] = await Promise.all([
      productRepository.query(countQuery, params),
      productRepository.query(dataQuery, dataParams),
    ]);

    const total = parseInt(countResult[0]?.total ?? "0", 10);
    const totalPages = Math.ceil(total / limitNum);

    return res.json({
      data: products,
      pagination: {
        page: pageNum,
        limit: limitNum,
        total,
        total_pages: totalPages,
        has_next: pageNum < totalPages,
        has_prev: pageNum > 1,
      },
      filters_applied: {
        ...(name && { name }),
        ...(search && { search }),
        ...(category && { category }),
        ...(categories && { categories }),
        ...(brand && { brand }),
        ...(brands && { brands }),
        ...(min_price && { min_price }),
        ...(max_price && { max_price }),
        ...(min_rating && { min_rating }),
        ...(in_stock && { in_stock }),
      },
    });
  } catch (error) {
    console.error("Product search error:", error);
    return res.status(500).json({ error: "Internal server error" });
  }
});

// Application setup
const app = express();
app.use(express.json());
app.use(router);

export { app, router };
export default app;
